[[General/Legends|General]] '''Sinick Kritkeen''', a top-ranking [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] official, was the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] overseer of [[Aruza/Legends|Aruza]] during its subjugation by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He bore a slight resemblance to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Biography==
The [[Aruzan/Legends|Aruzans]] hired the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] to assassinate him. Kritkeen's resemblance to Solo made Dengar enjoy killing him. In fact, while doing the deed, Dengar deluded himself into believing that Kritkeen actually ''was'' Solo. The COMPNOR official was killed when Dengar put a [[Concussion grenade/Legends|concussion grenade]] in his mouth, threw him off a cliff, and shot him twice in mid-air as he fell. The display was payback for injuries caused by Solo's swoop as he vividly remembered.

{{Char-stub}}
